title: Usopp’s Village Comes Into View
description: On pages 7–10, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That is why I hired some guards

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: They're there to ensure your safety

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: All this is for your own good, Ojousama!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I know...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm glad you under- stand

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'll put your medicine here, please take it

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: SLAM...!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: OKAY...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: knock knock...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: usopasan...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You had that depressed look again

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm sorry. I wanted to treat you like a proper guest...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But Claha- DOR won't allow it...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's not like you are a bad person

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Never mind, I feel com- fortable here. The somber- mess of the room will suffocate me

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Because I'm...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: A brave warrior of the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So which adven- ture...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Are you going to tell me today?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Let's see, today I will tell you...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: About the time when I was five and fought with a southern giant gold- fish......!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Gold- fish?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The most amazing thing was its faces, it was very very very big and very very long

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I thought it was land and even docked there......

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Wow!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He's a great guy!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So to restore her spirits,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He's been going for a year to amuse her with made up tales?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I like his "nosiness"

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I like the captain's "coward- ice"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I like his "lies"!!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
